---
title: "GitHub Pages Example"
author: "Angie Kochkarova"
format: html
---

---
title: "My Course Portfolio"
format: html
---

# Welcome

Hello world! Welcome to my portfolio website.

## Course Lessons

- Introduction to Literate Analysis Using Quarto
- Tidy Data
- Cleaning and Wrangling Data
- Data Visualization

## Assignment Links

- [Introduction to Quarto](a01.html)

- [Data Cleaning Assignment](CopyOfa03.html)
